title: Sanji Pushes Luffy Away
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Nami, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #12 as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji tries to protect the crew by rejecting Luffy, but Luffy refuses to accept a false goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Just outside sweet city

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Heavens... no good... no good- JU!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Luffy's location

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please, all I'm asking is that you hide!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You won't be breaking your promise if you move a tiny bit away from this place!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Not a chance!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If Sanji shows up he'll think I left!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You guys can go if you want!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Luffy, I'm begging you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you under- stand whose territory you're in?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We've located straw hat Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You stand zero chance of taking down an army of that size!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I already made my promise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So I'm staying right here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Inside the whole cake chateau.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Pudding's room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: PLEASE FORGIVE ME!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was unable to keep my promise with Luffy and his comrades!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's my fault that they're in all this trouble right now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see, I was wondering how they managed to get here through that heavily guarded port at sea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But either way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I wouldn't have gone to the coast.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If you're talking about the Invita- Tion...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I took all the blame for you, everything would've worked out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once you attend the ceremony, your chances of escape become nigh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that Mama is so familiar with forced marriages,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She makes it a point to put these ominous wrists on people who give her the slightest inkling that they may run!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I am

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once they are placed on you, you no longer have any options!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...you talking about these?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oh dear...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: your mama has the keys to these.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If we want to steal them back...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our only recourse is to take on and defeat her entire crew.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It can't be... Has Mama already begun to move?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yes... and to make matters worse...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: As of this very moment...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't have a single ally I can count on.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We may be related by blood...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But this is what they really think of me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm nothing more than a failure in the eyes of my so called family.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Empathy and compassion are foreign to them when it comes to me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Those injuries ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never... not once... gotten joy in having been born a royal!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why I left for the sea in the first place...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In search of a place I wasn't even sure existed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if I try and resist this marriage... All my friends...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone I hold dear will suffer the consequences.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To make matters worse, the man I consider my father who happens to reside in the east blue is also at risk.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're just looking for an excuse to pounce on that Saviour of mine too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've carefully weighed my options... but there's no place for me to run.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why I've decided to quit struggling and just go with the flow.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: in exchange... I wanted big mom to let my friends off her hook!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But instead of that, at this very moment... they're all out there trying to find and destroy them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...I'm so sorry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My own mother... has put all of you in such a precarious situation...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, there's no need for you to apologize! None of this is on you, pudding!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Until 13 years ago... I lived in pure hell.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've returned to that hell now, but during those 13 years I was away...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was greeted with a lifestyle that allowed me to be incredibly happy.

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 62 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
